sections.name: liquid-lab-announcement-bar-basic
sections.description: Sticky top-of-page announcement bar with static centered or scrolling marquee mode. Supports optional link, dismissible close button with localStorage persistence, configurable bar height, and full color-scheme integration. Marquee animation is pure CSS with reduced-motion fallback.

sections.name: liquid-lab-collection-cards
sections.description: Product grid that pulls from a merchant-selected Shopify collection — first Liquid Lab section to use live store data. Each card renders product image (LCP-optimized: eager + fetchpriority high for the first two cards on above-the-fold sections), title (linked to product.url), price (with strikethrough compare_at_price when on sale), optional vendor name, optional sale badge (only renders when compare_at_price > price AND show_sale_badge is enabled), and a 'View product' CTA. Responsive 2/3/4 column grid via §8.4 card pattern. Includes the full UI Element Settings Standard: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading/product_title/product_price, §8.4 card with all 5 hover effects (none/lift/scale/border/glow) and 4 shadow tiers, §8.5 image (border radius, dual-control overlay, object-fit, aspect ratio), §8.6 background, §8.8 layout (content alignment, header max width, items gap/align, columns, section width), §8.9 universal (hide on mobile/desktop, custom CSS). Independent sale badge color + text-color tokens. Optional view-all button linked to collection.url. Falls back to Dawn placeholder SVGs when no collection is selected so the section is editable in Theme Editor before products are wired up. prefers-reduced-motion respected; focus-visible rings on every link/CTA; product cards are <article>; product titles are <h3>; aria-labels on every product link include the product name.

sections.name: liquid-lab-contact-form
sections.description: Block-based contact form wired to Shopify's native /contact endpoint via the {% form 'contact' %} Liquid tag. Merchants compose the form themselves from 9 block types: 5 form fields (email_field, text_field, tel_field, textarea_field, select_field), 1 consent checkbox (checkbox_field with richtext label), and 3 info column blocks (info_email, info_phone, info_address). Three layout modes: single column, two-column (info left + form right), two-column-reverse (form left + info right). Per-field width control on desktop (half/full) renders fields in a responsive grid that collapses to single column on mobile. Form supports optional card-style container with bg, border, radius, shadow (§8.4). Pre-fills name + email from logged-in customer. On successful submission renders a success message via form.posted_successfully? with optional 'hide form after success' toggle. On validation errors, renders a focusable role='alert' summary with anchor links to each invalid field, plus per-field aria-invalid + aria-describedby + visible error message. Built on the Liquid Lab spacing v2 system: lab_section + lab_container utilities, spacing_size (none/small/medium/large/custom) and container_width (narrow/boxed/wide/full) settings. Three Dark/Warm/Bold presets ship with default block sets. Shopify-native honeypot (spam protection); zero JavaScript dependencies; WCAG AA compliant.
sections.notes: Complete v2.0.0 rebuild from v1.0.0 (which had hardcoded fields). Now block-based — merchants add only the fields they need. Migrated to Liquid Lab spacing system (lab_section + lab_container).

sections.name: liquid-lab-countdown-timer
sections.description: Live countdown to a merchant-set end date (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS) showing days, hours, minutes, and seconds. Vanilla-JS IIFE scoped to the section ID via document.getElementById, updates every second with setInterval, pads each value to two digits with String.padStart, and replaces the timer with a merchant-set expired message when the countdown reaches zero (also clearing the interval and hiding the CTA). Listens for shopify:section:unload to clear the interval and detach handlers — Theme Editor safe. Each digit block is a separate styled container (bg color, border, radius — all merchant-controlled) with the digit + optional label below; colon separators between blocks. aria-live='polite' + aria-atomic='true' on the timer wrapper so screen readers get the time-remaining announcement without spamming the user every second. Includes the full UI Element Settings Standard: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading/timer_digits/timer_labels, §8.3 button settings, §8.6 background, §8.8 layout (content_alignment, content_position, content_max_width, section_width), §8.9 universal. Independent separator color and digit-block styling tokens. Three Dark/Warm/Bold presets.

sections.name: liquid-lab-faq-accordion
sections.description: Frequently-asked-questions accordion built on native <details>/<summary> elements — zero JavaScript. Each question is a merchant-editable block with question text, answer textarea, and an open-by-default toggle. Three icon styles (plus/minus, arrow, none) implemented in pure CSS via ::before/::after pseudo-elements that rotate on details[open]. Smooth height animation uses the grid-template-rows: 0fr → 1fr trick for transition without JS height measurement. Optional dividers between items. Includes the full UI Element Settings Standard: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading/question/answer, §8.6 section background, §8.7 dividers, §8.8 layout (content position, content max width, accordion max width, items gap, items align, section width), §8.9 universal settings (hide on mobile/desktop, custom CSS). Standard 3-field animation respects prefers-reduced-motion. Keyboard navigation comes free from <summary>; focus-visible ring on each summary; section aria-label + role=list on the FAQ list.

sections.name: liquid-lab-features-icons
sections.description: Features/benefits grid with 3 or 4 icon cards. Each card (icon, title, description) is a merchant-editable block, reorderable in the Theme Editor. Supports emoji icons, outlined/filled/plain card styles, optional scroll-triggered animations, and full color-scheme integration.

sections.name: liquid-lab-hero-basic
sections.description: Hero section with heading, subheading, CTA button, and background image with adjustable overlay. Supports left/center/right content alignment and optional full-viewport height.

sections.name: liquid-lab-hero-with-finder
sections.description: Composite hero: full-bleed background slider with a positioned product-finder overlay. Reuses the snippet shipped with #12 liquid-lab-product-finder via {% render 'liquid-lab-product-finder' %} — zero code duplication for the finder UI. Two block types in one section: slide (max 10) and filter (max 6). The slider supports auto-rotate, prev/next arrows, dot indicators, swipe on mobile, keyboard nav (Left/Right when focused), and pause-on-hover/focus. Two transition modes (slide / fade). Per-slide overlay override on top of a section default (color + opacity + style: solid / gradient-bottom / gradient-radial). Finder positions: right (default), left, center-overlay; mobile always stacks below the slider. Full UI Element Settings Standard for the finder card/field/submit (mirrors #12 with finder_* prefix). Six finder-driver settings are unprefixed (cta_hover_effect, fields_layout, card_align, entrance_animation, entrance_type, submit_full_width) because the snippet auto-reads them from card_settings.settings. LCP optimization: first slide eager + fetchpriority high when section.index <= 2. Slider ARIA: region/slideshow roledescription, aria-current on active slide, aria-hidden + inert on inactive, role=tab on dots. Touch-target 44px min on arrows, dots, selects, submit. focus-visible rings on all interactive elements. Shopify.designMode integration: autoplay disabled, shopify:block:select jumps to that slide. prefers-reduced-motion respected (autoplay disabled, animations neutralized). Three Dark/Warm/Bold presets seeded with realistic 3 slides + 3 filter blocks each.
sections.notes: Reuses snippet from #12 liquid-lab-product-finder. Sprint 2 of hero+finder series.

sections.name: liquid-lab-image-with-text
sections.description: Split-screen section with image on one side and text content on the other — used for brand storytelling, product features, and about sections. Image position (left/right desktop), image width (40/50/60%), and mobile layout (image-first/text-first) are all merchant-controlled. Content stack supports an optional pill badge above the heading, heading + subheading + richtext body, plus two side-by-side CTAs. Includes the full UI Element Settings Standard: §8.2 typography for badge/heading/subheading/body_text, §8.3 button settings for both primary and secondary CTA (each with its own hover effect — fill/darken/lift/outline/glow), §8.5 image settings (border radius, dual-control overlay, object-fit, aspect ratio), §8.6 section background, §8.8 layout (content position, content max width, items gap, items align, vertical alignment, section width), §8.9 universal settings (hide on mobile/desktop, custom CSS). LCP-aware image loading (eager when section.index ≤ 2), explicit width/height + 4-step srcset to prevent CLS, image scale-on-hover. Standard 3-field animation respects prefers-reduced-motion; focus-visible ring on every CTA; section aria-label; placeholder SVG when no image is set.

sections.name: liquid-lab-logo-bar
sections.description: Logo bar / 'trusted by' band with two layouts: a CSS-only infinite marquee (configurable direction, speed, hover-pause, mask-image edge fade) and a static responsive grid (1–4 cols mobile, 2–8 cols desktop). Logos render with a default grayscale + reduced-opacity treatment that lifts to full color/opacity on hover (or the inverse, for the Bold preset). Per-block height and opacity overrides via inline CSS variables, optional click-through URL with full focus-visible ring and 44×44 touch target. Theme Editor design-mode automatically halves the marquee speed so editing is smoother. prefers-reduced-motion stops the marquee, drops to flex-wrap, and collapses every entrance animation. Three presets — Dark (tech/premium, uppercase tracking, deep-navy bg), Warm (skincare/wellness, light serif weight, sand bg), Bold (fashion/lifestyle, full-color logos with reverse hover, hairline borders top + bottom). 24-block hard cap, smooth-loop guard renders the track 4× when block count < 4. Section-scoped @keyframes (`lab_logo_marquee_{section.id}`) so multiple instances on one page never collide.

sections.name: liquid-lab-newsletter-signup
sections.description: Email-capture section wired to Shopify's native customer endpoint via the {% form 'customer' %} Liquid tag — automatic CSRF token, no manual hidden inputs needed. Captures email (required) plus optional first name. Two layout modes: stacked (input above button, full width) and inline (input + button side-by-side from 600px up via flexbox). On successful submission renders the merchant-set success message via form.posted_successfully?; on validation error surfaces form.errors.messages.email. Includes the full UI Element Settings Standard: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading/privacy_text, §8.3 button settings (with all five hover effects), §8.6 background, §8.8 layout (content_alignment, content_position, content_max_width default 600, section_width), §8.9 universal (hide_on_mobile, hide_on_desktop, custom_css). Independent input styling block: bg, border color/width/radius, focus border. Visually-hidden labels for the input fields plus aria-describedby pointing at the privacy text. focus-visible 3px box-shadow ring on inputs and submit. Three Dark/Warm/Bold presets with brand-tailored copy and color tuning.

sections.name: liquid-lab-product-finder
sections.description: Block-based filter widget that submits to a Shopify-native collection filter URL — zero JavaScript. Up to 6 filter dropdowns per section, each backed by a tag, vendor, or metafield (filter.p.tag, filter.p.vendor, filter.p.m.{namespace}.{key}). Manual options entered by the merchant as Label|value lines in a textarea. Card-style container with full UI Element Settings Standard coverage: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading/labels, §8.3 button settings (with all five hover effects + full-width toggle), §8.4 card (bg, border, radius, shadow, padding mobile/desktop), §8.6 section background (color, opacity, gradient), §8.8 layout (vertical_stack vs horizontal_row fields, card_align, card_max_width), §8.9 universal (hide_on_mobile/desktop, section_width, custom_css). Independent field styling block: bg, text, border color/width/radius, padding, focus color. Reusable snippet (snippets/liquid-lab-product-finder.liquid) with parameter-based interface — pre-wired for #13 liquid-lab-hero-with-finder via the context parameter ('standalone' MVP, 'overlay' for the hero). Touch-target 44px min on selects and submit. focus-visible 3px box-shadow ring on selects + 2px outline on submit. Three Dark/Warm/Bold presets with realistic seeded blocks (Category/Brand/Price for Dark, Skin type/Concern/Routine step for Warm, Style/Size/Color for Bold).

sections.name: liquid-lab-testimonials-grid
sections.description: Customer testimonial cards in a 2 or 3 column grid. Each testimonial is a merchant-editable block with star rating (1–5), quote, customer name, role/company, optional avatar (with initials fallback), and an optional verified badge. Includes the full UI Element Settings Standard: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading/quote/name/role, §8.4 card with hover effects, §8.5 image controls for the avatar, §8.6 section background, §8.8 layout (columns, gap, items align, content max width, header alignment), and §8.9 universal settings (hide on mobile/desktop, section width, custom CSS). Optional scroll-triggered animation respects prefers-reduced-motion.
